title: ZLAR Governed Action Receipt
description: Portable cryptographic proof that a governed action was evaluated by deterministic policy and decided by the appropriate authority. Verifiable by anyone with the public key.

receipt_version.description: Schema version. Verifiers must reject unknown versions.

id.description: Unique receipt identifier. Hex timestamp + random bytes.

governed_action.description: What was attempted. The detail_hash protects the full action detail without exposing it in the receipt.

tool.description: Tool name as received by the gate (e.g., Bash, Edit, Write).

domain.description: Policy domain classification (e.g., file, network, process, system).

detail_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical detail object. Proves what action was governed without leaking specifics.

decision.description: What happened. The governance decision and who made it.

outcome.description: allow/deny = policy decided. authorized/denied = human decided. timeout = no human response within window.

rule.description: Policy rule that matched (e.g., R002, R014, default).

authorizer.description: Who made the final decision. policy = deterministic rule. human = person via Telegram. gate = fail-closed default. timeout = escalation window expired. manifest = agent manifest constraint.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the decision.

evidence.description: Provenance. What policy was active, what manifest was in effect, and where this receipt anchors in the audit chain.

policy_version.description: Version of the policy that was evaluated.

manifest_version.description: Version of the agent manifest in effect, or null if no manifest.

manifest_agent_id.description: Agent identity from the manifest, or null if no manifest.

manifest_principal.description: Human principal accountable for the agent, or null if no manifest.

agent_id.description: Agent identifier at this delegation level.

manifest_id.description: Manifest governing this agent at this level, if any.

delegation_chain.description: Parent-to-child authority chain. Empty array if no delegation.

audit_event_id.description: ID of the audit trail entry this receipt was generated from.

audit_prev_hash.description: prev_hash from the audit trail entry. Anchors the receipt to the hash chain.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over the canonical receipt content (all fields except signature).

key_id.description: Public key fingerprint (first 16 chars of SHA-256 of public key file).

prev_receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the previous receipt in the receipt chain, or null for the first receipt. Links receipts into a secondary chain independent of the audit trail.
